event.title: Global Summit on Data Science and Cloud Computing in Rome, Italy, India

body.p: Welcome to the Global Summit on Data Science and Cloud Computing during October 19-20, 2026 at Rome, Italy, a gathering built for thinkers, builders, innovators, and dreamers who believe that intelligent systems and cloud-native technologies can reshape the world. It is a joy to welcome you to this international stage where research meets industry, ideas spark action, and collaboration fuels the next wave of transformation. Over the next two days, you will join a community of data scientists, cloud architects, AI researchers, engineers, analysts, developers, and technology leaders from every corner of the world who share a single purpose: to explore what is possible when human curiosity meets powerful digital tools.
